note: Responds in English only — not fine-tuned for Polish. Demonstrates need for Polish fine-tuning.
Good Polish comprehension, fits in 12GB VRAM. Production candidate for fine-tuning.
Best quality but GPU+CPU offload makes it too slow for production (12GB VRAM insufficient). RTX PRO 6000 96GB would run this at 30+ tok/s.
hardware: NVIDIA RTX 4080 Laptop 12GB VRAM (with CPU offload)

_summary.finding: 12GB VRAM is a critical bottleneck. Nemotron-Mini lacks Polish capability (needs fine-tuning). Qwen3 32B has best quality but is 6x slower due to CPU offload. NVIDIA DGX Spark (128GB) or RTX PRO 6000 (96GB) would eliminate all bottlenecks.
_summary.recommendation: Fine-tune Nemotron-4-15B on Polish social economy data using NeMo Framework with LoRA on dedicated GPU hardware.
